description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the aayushdutt/carbonfootprint Docker image, caches the node_modules/ directory, and runs 'yarn' in a global before_script for all jobs. Add an eetest job that executes 'npm run groupChrome', then sets the environment variable with 'export environment=CI', and finally runs 'xvfb-run --server-args="-screen 0, 1024x768x24" npm run eetest'. Add a test job that runs 'npm test'. Both jobs run in the default stage and have no special rules or artifacts.
